name: opendoc
description: Local knowledge base: one-way mirrors authorized Notion/Feishu docs into a local read-only Markdown tree the agent searches directly with Grep/Glob/Read (queries may be Chinese, e.g. 搜飞书/Notion 笔记); ships the sync-engine binary and onboarding guide.

interface.shortDescription: Mirror your Notion/Feishu docs into a local, greppable knowledge base
interface.longDescription: opendoc one-way mirrors the documents you've authorized in Notion and Feishu/Lark into a local read-only Markdown tree. The agent answers from it directly with filesystem search — no API, no credentials, no network at query time. The plugin ships the sync-engine binary (downloaded on first use, sha256-verified) plus onboarding and retrieval guides.
defaultPrompt: 上次关于 X 的结论是什么？搜一下我的飞书文档
